name: io.github.dr-deploy/drdeploy-mcp
title: Dr.Deploy
description: MCP tools for drdeploy: scan deployed sites, list, get findings, check status.

environmentVariables.name: DRDEPLOY_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Bearer token for the drdeploy API. Run `drdeploy login` to mint one.

environmentVariables.name: DRDEPLOY_API_HOST
environmentVariables.description: Override the API host. Defaults to https://drdeploy.dev.
